searchPage.modeCatalog: Search AI & Neural Network Technologies Collection

about.title: About this project
about.intro: Scopus Search is a personal project — a searchable, analytics-ready collection of Scopus-indexed publications on artificial intelligence and neural networks.
about.dataSourceBody: Articles are pulled from the Scopus Search API and refreshed on a recurring schedule. The collection tracks open-access status and includes only DOI-indexed articles.
about.howBuiltBody: A FastAPI + PostgreSQL backend and a React + TypeScript frontend, deployed on Railway and Vercel. Built as a portfolio project — the source code is public.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.placeholder: This page is a placeholder. A full privacy policy — covering data collected (email, password, search history) and third-party services in use (Google OAuth, GA4, Brevo) — will be published here.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.placeholder: This page is a placeholder. Full terms of service will be published here.
